# NexaBuild

> Professional web design and e-commerce agency based in Amman, Jordan. We build websites and online stores for businesses in the Arab world.

## Services

- **Website Design** — Up to 5 pages, free hosting and domain for 1 year, starting at $199
- **Online Store** — Full e-commerce with payment gateway, free hosting and domain, starting at $399
- **Monthly Care** — Ongoing updates, backups, and technical support

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +962 79 747 9825
- Email: info@nexabuild.cloud
- Location: Amman, Jordan

## Portfolio

- [Jordan 3D Print](https://jordan3dprint.com) — 3D printing services in Jordan
- [Jordan Automation](https://app.jordan-automation.com) — Bambu Lab & Elegoo distributor platform

## Languages

This site is available in Arabic (default) and English. Arabic URL: /ar — English URL: /en
